title: Crafty Candy Blast
short_description: Join Candice and Cookie on their journey through an enchanted land of sweet treats — pop and blast your way through thousands of scrumptious levels.
description: Join Candice and Cookie on their journey through an enchanted land of sweet treats. From marshmallow madness to gooey chocolate waterfalls, discover the tastiest adventure ever as you pop and blast your way through thousands of scrumptious levels.
